title: MILITARY HELPLINE - 211info
text: LINES FOR LIFE MILITARY HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline giving information about benefits, PTSD, substance use disorders, anger management issues, and counseling in regard to suicidal thoughts. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Individuals who are active duty military, veterans, and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 457-4838 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (888) 457-4838 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Mental Health Crisis Lines * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Substance Use Disorder Hotlines * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Suicide Prevention Hotlines * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Veteran/Military Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CONSTRUCTION CARELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SENIOR LONELINESS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTHLINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINES FOR LIFE
